item.title: 资本主义时代，钱是最重要的 后资本主义时代，钱已经不再重要了 钱都不重要了，投资还重要吗？ 现在这些一级市场二级市场的东西，都会变得像游戏里的交易所和赌场 这么看 polymarket 很未来
item.description:

item.title:
We’re entering a new era of engineering. 👏
Together with @Cadence, NVIDIA is advancing agentic AI, ...
item.description:
We’re entering a new era of engineering. 👏
Together with @Cadence, NVIDIA is advancing agentic AI, physics-based simulation, and digital twins to help engineers design, test, and optimize systems at unprecedented speed and scale.
